metadata.description: Deep research pipeline: parse question → search → extract sources → synthesize report with citations → deliver

phases.name: Question Analysis
phases.description: Parse and expand the research question

phases.name: Deep Search
phases.description: Search via Perplexica and web sources

steps.title: Parse and expand research question
steps.description: Analyze the research question. Identify key topics, sub-questions, and search terms. Output a structured research plan with 3-5 search queries.

steps.title: Deep web search
steps.description: Execute the search queries from the research plan. Use web_search to find relevant sources. Use web_extract to read full content of top 5 sources. Collect raw findings.

steps.title: Search for competing perspectives
steps.description: Search for alternative viewpoints, counterarguments, or competing approaches to the research topic. Add findings to context.

steps.title: Validate and rank sources
steps.description: Review raw findings. Assess credibility of sources. Identify the top 5-8 most relevant and authoritative sources. Flag any outdated or unreliable sources.

steps.title: Synthesize research report
steps.description: Write a comprehensive research report based on validated sources. Include: executive summary, key findings, analysis, competing viewpoints, conclusions, and citations. Use markdown format.

steps.title: Review and finalize report
steps.description: Review the research report for accuracy, completeness, and clarity. Check that all claims are supported by cited sources. Output the final polished report.
